mapper.select:
SELECT STATUS.eduId, STATUS.eduTitle, STATUS.progress, STATUS.completedCount, STATUS.studyTime, STATUS.recentStudyAt, STATUS.learningType, STATUS.studyPath FROM ( SELECT TE.ID AS eduId, TE.EDU_TITLE AS eduTitle, CASE WHEN TES.EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(TES.EDU_START_COMPLETED_COUNT / TES.EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT * 100) END AS progress, TES.EDU_START_COMPLETED_COUNT AS completedCount, NVL( ROUND( ( CAST(MAX(NVL(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT, TES.EDU_START_AT)) AS DATE) - CAST(TES.EDU_START_AT AS DATE) ) * 24 * 60 * 60 ), 0 ) AS studyTime, CAST(MAX(NVL(TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT, TES.EDU_START_AT)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS recentStudyAt, 'LEARN' AS learningType, '/study/learn/quiz/greeting' AS studyPath FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM ON TE.ID = TEWM.EDU_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WORD_STUDY TWS ON TEWM.ID = TWS.EDU_WORD_MAP_ID AND TWS.USER_ID = TES.USER_ID AND TWS.WORD_STUDY_UPDATE_AT >= TES.EDU_START_AT WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 AND TES.EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED = 0 AND TES.ID = ( SELECT MAX(TES2.ID) FROM TBL_EDU_START TES2 WHERE TES2.USER_ID = TES.USER_ID AND TES2.EDU_ID = TES.EDU_ID AND TES2.EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED = 0 ) GROUP BY TES.ID, TE.ID, TE.EDU_TITLE, TES.EDU_START_AT, TES.EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT, TES.EDU_START_COMPLETED_COUNT
UNION ALL
SELECT TQ.ID AS eduId, TQ.QUIZ_TITLE AS eduTitle, CASE WHEN COUNT(TQQ.ID) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(TQS.QUIZ_START_COMPLETED_COUNT / COUNT(TQQ.ID) * 100) END AS progress, TQS.QUIZ_START_COMPLETED_COUNT AS completedCount, NVL( ROUND( (CAST(SYSDATE AS DATE) - CAST(TQS.QUIZ_START_AT AS DATE)) * 24 * 60 * 60 ), 0 ) AS studyTime, CAST(TQS.QUIZ_START_AT AS TIMESTAMP) AS recentStudyAt, 'QUIZ' AS learningType, CASE WHEN TQ.ID = 1 THEN '/study/chapter/sign-history' WHEN TQ.ID = 2 THEN '/study/chapter/sos' WHEN TQ.ID = 3 THEN '/study/chapter/morse' ELSE '/study/chapter' END AS studyPath FROM TBL_QUIZ_START TQS JOIN TBL_QUIZ TQ ON TQS.QUIZ_ID = TQ.ID JOIN TBL_QUIZ_EDU TQE ON TQ.ID = TQE.QUIZ_ID JOIN TBL_QUIZ_QUESTION TQQ ON TQE.QUIZ_QUESTION_ID = TQQ.ID WHERE TQS.USER_ID = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT TQA WHERE TQA.USER_ID = TQS.USER_ID AND TQA.QUIZ_ID = TQS.QUIZ_ID AND TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_CREATE_AT >= TQS.QUIZ_START_AT ) GROUP BY TQ.ID, TQ.QUIZ_TITLE, TQS.QUIZ_START_COMPLETED_COUNT, TQS.QUIZ_START_AT HAVING TQS.QUIZ_START_COMPLETED_COUNT < COUNT(TQQ.ID) ) STATUS ORDER BY STATUS.recentStudyAt DESC, STATUS.eduId ASC

SELECT RESULT.quizAttemptId, RESULT.quizId, RESULT.quizTitle, RESULT.correctCount, RESULT.totalCount, RESULT.spentTime, RESULT.accuracy, RESULT.quizAttemptCreateAt, RESULT.resultType, RESULT.resultPath FROM ( SELECT TES.ID AS quizAttemptId, TE.ID AS quizId, TE.EDU_TITLE AS quizTitle, TES.EDU_START_CORRECT_COUNT AS correctCount, TES.EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount, TES.EDU_START_TIME AS spentTime, CASE WHEN TES.EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(TES.EDU_START_CORRECT_COUNT / TES.EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT * 100) END AS accuracy, CAST(NVL(TES.EDU_START_COMPLETED_AT, TES.EDU_START_AT) AS TIMESTAMP) AS quizAttemptCreateAt, 'LEARN' AS resultType, '/study/learn' AS resultPath FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 AND TES.EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT TQA.ID AS quizAttemptId, TQ.ID AS quizId, TQ.QUIZ_TITLE AS quizTitle, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE AS correctCount, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TIME AS spentTime, CASE WHEN TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE / TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT * 100) END AS accuracy, CAST(TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_CREATE_AT AS TIMESTAMP) AS quizAttemptCreateAt, 'QUIZ' AS resultType, CASE WHEN TQ.ID = 1 THEN '/study/chapter/sign-history/result' WHEN TQ.ID = 2 THEN '/study/chapter/sos/result' WHEN TQ.ID = 3 THEN '/study/chapter/morse/result' ELSE '/study/chapter' END AS resultPath FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT TQA JOIN TBL_QUIZ TQ ON TQA.QUIZ_ID = TQ.ID WHERE TQA.USER_ID = #{userId} ) RESULT ORDER BY RESULT.quizAttemptCreateAt DESC, RESULT.quizAttemptId DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(SUMMARY_DATA.totalCount), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( NVL(SUM(SUMMARY_DATA.correctCount), 0) / SUM(SUMMARY_DATA.totalCount) * 100 ) END AS totalAccuracy, NVL(SUM(SUMMARY_DATA.correctCount), 0) AS totalQuestionCount, NVL(SUM(SUMMARY_DATA.spentTime), 0) AS totalStudyTime FROM ( SELECT TES.EDU_START_CORRECT_COUNT AS correctCount, TES.EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount, TES.EDU_START_TIME AS spentTime FROM TBL_EDU_START TES JOIN TBL_EDU TE ON TES.EDU_ID = TE.ID WHERE TES.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TE.EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 AND TES.EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_SCORE AS correctCount, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TOTAL_COUNT AS totalCount, TQA.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_TIME AS spentTime FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT TQA WHERE TQA.USER_ID = #{userId} ) SUMMARY_DATA

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TQAD.ID ASC) AS QUESTION_NUMBER, CASE WHEN TQAD.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_DETAIL_IS_CORRECT = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_CORRECT FROM TBL_QUIZ_ATTEMPT_DETAIL TQAD WHERE TQAD.QUIZ_ATTEMPT_ID = #{quizAttemptId} ORDER BY TQAD.ID ASC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TESD.ID ASC) AS QUESTION_NUMBER, CASE WHEN TESD.EDU_START_DETAIL_IS_CORRECT = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_CORRECT FROM TBL_EDU_START_DETAIL TESD WHERE TESD.EDU_START_ID = #{eduStartId} ORDER BY TESD.ID ASC
